title: viola corsica
intro: Viola corsica, also known as Corsican violet or Mountain pansy, is a perennial plant species in the violet family (Violaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Viola corsica include reduced inflammation, improved respiratory issues, and potential antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Viola corsica can be found in tea, tincture, and infusion forms, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
